goal: action_identity_constraint[G, X](a.act) = forall(x0: X) { a.act(G.1, x0) = x0 }
proof: function[T0, T1: Group](x0: (T1, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(T1.1, x1) = x1 } = action_identity_constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[X, G](a.act)

(forall(x0: X) { a.act(G.1, x0) = x0 } = is_mul_action[G, X](a.act))
(forall(x1: X) { a.act(G.1, x1) = x1 } = true)
function(x0: X) { a.act(G.1, x0) = x0 }(x)

goal: is_mul_action[G, X](a.act) = action_mul_constraint[G, X](a.act) and action_identity_constraint[G, X](a.act)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { (action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) and action_identity_constraint[T0, T1](x0)) = is_mul_action[T0, T1](x0) }[G, X](a.act)

goal: action_mul_constraint[G, X](a.act) = forall(x0: G, x1: G, x2: X) { a.act(x0 * x1, x2) = a.act(x0, a.act(x1, x2)) }
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 * x2, x3) } = action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[G, X](a.act)
(forall(x0: G, x1: G, x2: X) { a.act(x0, a.act(x1, x2)) = a.act(x0 * x1, x2) } = true)
